title: Sunflower Sprout Delight Salad
description: A simple and refreshing salad featuring the nutty flavors of sunflower and the crunch of sprouts.
instructions: 2. Spread the sunflower seeds on a baking sheet and toast for 10 minutes.
3. In a large bowl, combine the toasted sunflower seeds and sprouts.
4. In a small bowl, whisk together the chopped Delight and a squeeze of lemon juice.
5. Pour the dressing over the sunflower and sprout mixture and toss to combine.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
